input_roles.main_reference_image: Locks prop silhouette, material, proportion and craftsmanship details.
input_roles.supporting_reference_images: Supplement wear, texture, use state or close construction detail.

must_preserve: construction logic, joints, seams, hinges, seals or edges
material family, color, aging, dirt, wear and markings
may_vary: neutral support surface or measurement cue
must_not_invent: a different object in each panel

layout.sheet_intent: functional proof board for one prop identity
layout.background: dark gray production board #1a1a1a with subtle technical grid

identity_badge.fallback: preserve a clean top-left badge plate for post-production overlay

view_plan.purpose: locks canonical silhouette and identifying details

view_plan.role: front, side, back and top or functional orthographic views
view_plan.purpose: proves volume, scale and part placement
shows material, joints, wear, markings, moving parts or edge construction
uses non-human measurement cues or design-implied state variants

critical_requirements: Output must remain a PROP_DESIGN_SHEET, not a product poster or object lineup.
Apply the subject invariant lock before arranging views.
All views must depict the same prop identity with stable morphology, scale, material logic and wear state.
No humans, hands, creatures, silhouettes or character takeover.
Top-left identity badge must show <prop_short_id> or preserve a clean overlay-ready badge plate.
negative_constraints: no people, hands, creatures or human-shaped shadows
no changed prop silhouette, proportions or material logic
no extra parts, labels, symbols or unrelated scene facts
no missing top-left identity badge area

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create one PROP_DESIGN_SHEET for <prop_name> (<prop_short_id>) using <desc> and the reference images. Apply subject_invariant_lock, top-left identity badge, hero/orthographic/detail/scale-state view plan, and no-human guardrails.

review_focus: same prop silhouette and construction logic across all views
orthographic or functional views prove part placement
detail callouts match source materials and wear
top-left short ID badge or overlay-ready badge plate
no human hand or character takeover
